payload.note: All 3 findings from scan-010 are already resolved in current codebase. Fixes predate or coincide with the scan timestamp (2026-03-08). Verified against HEAD.

findings.resolution: Current text reads 'No enforceable framework guarantees the right to work for workers displaced by automation.' — already uses the 'right to work' qualifier the scan recommended. The WARN Act / UI / TAA gap is implicitly acknowledged by the right-to-work framing.
The second heading is now '## Why a Binding Framework Matters' (unique, no longer duplicates '## The ICESCR Connection'). No ambiguous anchors remain.
Deloitte link is present: Deloitte: 34% deep adoption, 30% limited use, 37% non-adoption. Source accessible for researcher audience.
